product.name: Arox T4 WR/WP
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny robocze funkcyjne — antystatyczne i hydrofobowe
product.categorySourceGroup: Polyester Woven Fabrics for Raincoats, Jackets and Coveralls
product.titleDescriptor: 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane Milky Coated High Visible Waterproof Oxford Fabric
product.specLine: 210 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, Breathable, High Visible, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
descriptions: 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane milky back coated high visible, waterproof, breathable oxford fabric. Arox T4 WR/WP fabrics are used for outdoor jackets, trousers and bodywarmers which has waterproof functions.
Certified for EN ISO 20471, EN 343 and EN 13034
75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane Milky Coated High Visible Waterproof Oxford Fabric
210 g/m², 75% Polyester 25% Polyurethane, Waterproof, Breathable, High Visible, 1/1 Plain Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp > 1000N ; Weft > 800N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp > 30N ; Weft > 25N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1

matches.rationale: Explicitly certified to EN ISO 20471 and labeled for hi-vis safety jackets/raincoats, directly supporting high-visibility apparel classification.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Antistatic property and EN 1149 present, but no explicit connection to electrical utilities or high-voltage work.
Chemical resistance and EN 13034 mentioned, but no explicit welding/foundry/metallurgy use stated.
